parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini", temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: "system", content: "Analiza la imagen con precision y sin inventar." }, { role: "user", content: [ { type: "text", text: ($json.content && $json.content.trim() ? $json.content : "Describe esta imagen") }, { type: "image_url", image_url: { url: $json.media_url } } ] } ] } }}
